visa_types.name: Others (Sport, Cultural Scientific Event and Study Short-stay)
visa_types.documents_required:
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page
Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least 2 free pages, issued in previous 10 years.
- Non-Vietnamese applicant:  Residence permit in VNM + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian, or Australia visas
Purpose of travel and conditions of stay 
- Invitation letter issued by the inviting authority, stating the purpose of visit (i.e. culture/ sport), dates and conditions of stay
- Round air- ticket reservation
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Accommodation if not mentioned and proved by the invitation.
Proof of occupation and financial background 
- In case of employee

- Labour contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the confirmation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months

- In case of businessman

- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment

- In case of retired person

- Retirement book (original + copy)
- Proof of other income, if relevant ( i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of peasants

- Land use right (original + copy)
- Written declaration how the land is used
- Proof of regular income for the last 3 months, such as current bank account statements (savings account statements not accepted)
- Proof of other income, if relevant (i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of students

- Student ID
- Confirmation from school/ university on a letterhead paper regarding the stats of the student and consent with absent if during school year
Proof of social integration in the country of residence: 
- Confirmation of residence information with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs f bonds of the applicant to the home country, such as ownership of real-estate, background of the closet family members (e.g. labour contracts, proof of their income, school confirmation of attendance in the study programme, etc.)
- Wedding certificate (original +copy) in case that the application is married
- Birth certificate (original +copy) in case that the applicant has children
For Minor 
- If traveling with one parent only, written consent of the other parent or guardian.
- If traveling without parents, written consent of both parents/ guardians.
- Birth certificate
- Parents’ passport/ ID copy
Other documents 
Important Note:
- Vietnamese document need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice).
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected.
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 
								   45 days. There is no express fee for faster visa appointment or procedure.
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserve the right to request an interview.
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant
I have been informed and accept:
- That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process,
- That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.
CHECKLIST FOR OTHERS – please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2nJPqJPkXJngfq4PvT5xf1/b1b0dd4c5f844b3ae1a56bab7c58759a/Checklist_Other_CZE_2023.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
Application fees applicable for June 2026:

[Table:  Others (Sport, Cultural Scientific Event and Study Short-stay)]

- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per current exchange rate and will be updated later. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee in cash or through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- Applicants will be required to pay the VFS Global service fee via the international credit card/debit card from Thursday, 30 November 2023 onwards to confirm their appointment slot.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made.
Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/premium-services) for the price list of Additional Services.
visa_types.processing_time:
Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure.
It is a responsibility of the applicant to secure an appointment no less than 15 days before the intended date of travel and the VFS service fee will not be refunded in case that the appointment is not align with this rule.
visa_types.forms:
To download the Application Form: 
- Click on the form link for Czech or English
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in cultural/sports events. It is also applicable for other purpose such as conference, seminar, fair exhibition, short term employment, short term employment, official invitation authorized by Alien Police. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
Important notes: in  case the applicants is accompanied by travel agencies or intermediary individuals to prepare and  submit documents, travel agencies or intermediary individuals must obtain power  of attorney of the applicant (with applicant's signature, certified by local  authority) to enter VAC with the applicant. Visa Application Center for Czech Republic shall maintain  the rights to refuse third party to enter our Center if the power of attorney  is missing.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in cultural/sports events. It is also applicable for other purpose such as conference, seminar, fair exhibition, short term employment, short term employment, official invitation authorized by Alien Police. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
Important notes: in  case the applicants is accompanied by travel agencies or intermediary individuals to prepare and  submit documents, travel agencies or intermediary individuals must obtain power  of attorney of the applicant (with applicant's signature, certified by local  authority) to enter VAC with the applicant. Visa Application Center for Czech Republic shall maintain  the rights to refuse third party to enter our Center if the power of attorney  is missing. 

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for June 2026:

[Table:  Others (Sport, Cultural Scientific Event and Study Short-stay)]

- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per current exchange rate and will be updated later. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee in cash or through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- Applicants will be required to pay the VFS Global service fee via the international credit card/debit card from Thursday, 30 November 2023 onwards to confirm their appointment slot.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made.
Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/premium-services) for the price list of Additional Services.

## Documents Required
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page
Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least 2 free pages, issued in previous 10 years.
- Non-Vietnamese applicant:  Residence permit in VNM + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian, or Australia visas
Purpose of travel and conditions of stay 
- Invitation letter issued by the inviting authority, stating the purpose of visit (i.e. culture/ sport), dates and conditions of stay
- Round air- ticket reservation
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Accommodation if not mentioned and proved by the invitation.
Proof of occupation and financial background 
- In case of employee

- Labour contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the confirmation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months

- In case of businessman

- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment

- In case of retired person

- Retirement book (original + copy)
- Proof of other income, if relevant ( i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of peasants

- Land use right (original + copy)
- Written declaration how the land is used
- Proof of regular income for the last 3 months, such as current bank account statements (savings account statements not accepted)
- Proof of other income, if relevant (i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of students

- Student ID
- Confirmation from school/ university on a letterhead paper regarding the stats of the student and consent with absent if during school year
Proof of social integration in the country of residence: 
- Confirmation of residence information with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs f bonds of the applicant to the home country, such as ownership of real-estate, background of the closet family members (e.g. labour contracts, proof of their income, school confirmation of attendance in the study programme, etc.)
- Wedding certificate (original +copy) in case that the application is married
- Birth certificate (original +copy) in case that the applicant has children
For Minor 
- If traveling with one parent only, written consent of the other parent or guardian.
- If traveling without parents, written consent of both parents/ guardians.
- Birth certificate
- Parents’ passport/ ID copy
Other documents 
Important Note:
- Vietnamese document need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice).
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected.
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 
								   45 days. There is no express fee for faster visa appointment or procedure.
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserve the right to request an interview.
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant
I have been informed and accept:
- That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process,
- That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.
CHECKLIST FOR OTHERS – please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2nJPqJPkXJngfq4PvT5xf1/b1b0dd4c5f844b3ae1a56bab7c58759a/Checklist_Other_CZE_2023.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
To see the visa application photo  specifications, please, click  here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XJemv6Gh9UXIATl9UrgOs/f4bbc415fbd6ca8de44734cd60de238a/photo-specification-other.pdf).

## Processing Time
Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure.
It is a responsibility of the applicant to secure an appointment no less than 15 days before the intended date of travel and the VFS service fee will not be refunded in case that the appointment is not align with this rule.

## Download Forms
To download the Application Form: 
- Click on the form link for Czech or English
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Official Passport Holder
visa_types.documents_required:
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR VISA  APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5 cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:

- Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam
- Has got at least 2 free pages

- Official Note Verbal of Vietnamese government authority with the list of all members of the delegation.
- Invitation from the Czech institution with list of all member of delegation and itinerary of the stay.
- Return flight ticket reservation.
- The Original of medical travel insurance:

- In a conditions of insurance there must be clearly stated that insurance is valid for while Schengen area.
- Minimum insurance coverage is EUR 30.000
If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)

Vietnamese documents need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language.
Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure.
The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserves the right to request an interview.
Visa fee if free of charge for holders of official passport travelling for official business. 

CHECKLIST FOR OFFICIAL PASSPORT HOLDER – please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/768TqjWrYtZQhfAaKhDwj5/b231435300da182251155ad19978b1fb/Checklist_official_passport_CZE_2023.pdf)

[Table:  Official Passport Holder]

- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee in cash or through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- Applicants will be required to pay the VFS Global service fee via the international credit card/debit card from Thursday, 30 November 2023 onwards to confirm their appointment slot.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made.
Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/premium-services) for the price list of Additional Services.

It is a responsibility of the applicant to secure an appointment no less than 15 days before the intended date of travel and the VFS service fee will not be refunded in case that the appointment is not align with this rule.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose  of undertaking journeys by members of official delegations who, following an  official invitation, participate in meetings, consultations, negotiations or exchange  programs, as well as events held in the Czech by intergovernmental  organizations.
The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Vietnam maintains the possibility for applicants with official passport to submit their applications directly at the embassy.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose  of undertaking journeys by members of official delegations who, following an  official invitation, participate in meetings, consultations, negotiations or exchange  programs, as well as events held in the Czech by intergovernmental  organizations.
The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Vietnam maintains the possibility for applicants with official passport to submit their applications directly at the embassy.

## Visa Fees
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Applications for Schengen visas for this purpose are free of charge.
Application fees applicable for March 2025:
VFS Global Service Charges: Applicants shall be levied a service charge as follows. All VFS’s service charges are inclusive taxes.

[Table:  Official Passport Holder]

- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per current exchange rate and will be updated later. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee in cash or through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- Applicants will be required to pay the VFS Global service fee via the international credit card/debit card from Thursday, 30 November 2023 onwards to confirm their appointment slot.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made.
Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/premium-services) for the price list of Additional Services.

## Documents Required
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR VISA  APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5 cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:

- Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam
- Has got at least 2 free pages

- Official Note Verbal of Vietnamese government authority with the list of all members of the delegation.
- Invitation from the Czech institution with list of all member of delegation and itinerary of the stay.
- Return flight ticket reservation.
- The Original of medical travel insurance:

- In a conditions of insurance there must be clearly stated that insurance is valid for while Schengen area.
- Minimum insurance coverage is EUR 30.000
If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)

Vietnamese documents need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language.
Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure.
The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserves the right to request an interview.
Visa fee if free of charge for holders of official passport travelling for official business. 

CHECKLIST FOR OFFICIAL PASSPORT HOLDER – please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/768TqjWrYtZQhfAaKhDwj5/b231435300da182251155ad19978b1fb/Checklist_official_passport_CZE_2023.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
To see the visa application photo specifications, please, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Mp3cgDm0NMbnh5NUx91Aw/dd7073e0df81e54eae51fe1d61ff124c/Photo-spacifications-Recent.pdf).

## Processing Time
Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure.
It is a responsibility of the applicant to secure an appointment no less than 15 days before the intended date of travel and the VFS service fee will not be refunded in case that the appointment is not align with this rule.

## Download Forms
To download the Application Form: 
- Click on the form link for Czech or English
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:

- Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least two free pages, issued in previous 10 years.
- Non-Vietnamese applicant: Residence permit in Vietnam + copy.
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian or Australia visas.

- Non-Vietnamese applicant: Residence permit in VNM + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian, or Australia visas
Purpose of travel and conditions of stay
- Invitation letter from the Czech company/ Institution with full contact details, stating the purpose, duration and itinerary of the business trip.
- In case of business event/ conference/ exhibition fair – confirmation letter from the organization with full contact, details, description of the events, details of the invited person or list of invited persons
- Round air- ticket reservation
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Proof of accommodation – hotel reservation for the whole stay in the Schengen area
Proof of occupation and financial background
- In case of employee
- Labour contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the confirmation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months
- Social insurance booklet with updated information (copy)
- In case of businessman
- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment
Proof of social integration in the country of residence:
- Confirmation of residence information with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs of bonds of the applicant to the home country, such as ownership of real-estate, background of the closet family members (e.g. labour contracts, proof of their income, school confirmation of attendance in the study programme, etc.)
- Wedding certificate (original +copy) in case that the application is married
- Birth certificate (original +copy) in case that the applicant has children
Other documents
Important Note:
- Vietnamese document need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice).
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected.
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for faster visa appointment or procedure.
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserve the right to request an interview.
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant
I have been informed and accept:
- That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process,
- That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.
CHECKLIST FOR BUSINESS– please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6Yv0uey1t2EPNaEjiORwaT/47e1c8668b2ddb91779778a281f9a879/Checklist_Business_CZE_2023.pdf)

- An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa category is suitable for applicants who are traveling for the purpose of business (commercial purpose).
Important notes: in  case the applicants is accompanied by travel agencies or intermediary  individuals to prepare and submit documents, travel agencies or intermediary  individuals must obtain power of attorney of the applicant (with applicant's signature,  certified by local authority) to enter VAC with the applicant. Visa Application  Center for Czech Republic shall maintain the rights to refuse third party to  enter our Center if the power of attorney is missing.

- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per current exchange rate and will be updated later. It is subject to change without notice.

- That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application,

- That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.

## Photo Specifications
To see the visa application photo specifications, please, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/F3nuPfgXkTYwdbvaoXPoN/805bdc82d146cf9a63a1aeb82a439e2a/Business-Photo-specifications-Recent.pdf).

## Processing Time
Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure.
It is a responsibility of the applicant to secure an appointment no less than 15 days before the intended date of travel and the VFS service fee will not be refunded in case that the appointment is not align with this rule.

## Download Forms
To download the Application Form: 
- Click on the form link for Czech or English
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:
Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least 2 free pages, issued in previous 10 years.
- Non-Vietnamese applicant:  Residence permit in VNM + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian, or Australia visas
Purpose of travel and conditions of stay 
- Detailed travel itinerary/ certificate of the travel agency confirming the booking of an organized trip
- Round air- ticket reservation
- Means of transport within the Schengen area, if visiting more countries
- Proof of accommodation for the whole stay in the Schengen area – hotel reservation for the whole stay in the Schengen area
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)

Proof of occupation and financial background 
- Labour contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the confirmation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months
- Social insurance booklet with updated information (copy)

- In case of employee

- In case of businessman

- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment

- In case of retired person

- Retirement book (original + copy)
- Proof of other income, if relevant ( i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of students

- Student ID
- Confirmation from school/ university on a letterhead paper regarding the stats of the student and consent with absent if during school year
Proof of social integration in the country of residence: 
- Confirmation of residence information with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs f bonds of the applicant to the home country, such as ownership of real-estate, background of the closet family members (e.g. labour contracts, proof of their income, school confirmation of attendance in the study programme, etc.
- Wedding certificate (original +copy) in case that the application is married
- Birth certificate (original +copy) in case that the applicant has children
For Minor 
- If traveling with one parent only, written consent of the other parent or guardian.
- If traveling without parents, written consent of both parents/ guardians.
- Birth certificate
- Parents’ passport/ ID copy
Other documents 
- Specify
Important Note:
- Vietnamese document need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice).
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected.
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 
           45 days. There is no express fee for faster visa appointment or procedure.
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserve the right to request an interview.
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant
I have been informed and accept:
- That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process,
- That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.
CHECKLIST FOR TOURISM – please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5NBuNh2hjPrlg8SNlyogYo/511b9bae43f959c8649c3420c1c44b06/Checklist_Tourism_CZE_2023.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This type of visa is applicable for those who tend to visit the Czech Republic for tourism.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This type of visa is applicable for those who tend to visit the Czech Republic for tourism.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for June 2026:

[Table:  Tourism]

- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per current exchange rate and will be updated later. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee in cash or through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- Applicants will be required to pay the VFS Global service fee via the international credit card/debit card from Thursday, 30 November 2023 onwards to confirm their appointment slot.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made.
- Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/premium-services) for the price list of Additional Services.

## Documents Required
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:
Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least 2 free pages, issued in previous 10 years.
- Non-Vietnamese applicant:  Residence permit in VNM + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian, or Australia visas
Purpose of travel and conditions of stay 
- Detailed travel itinerary/ certificate of the travel agency confirming the booking of an organized trip
- Round air- ticket reservation
- Means of transport within the Schengen area, if visiting more countries
- Proof of accommodation for the whole stay in the Schengen area – hotel reservation for the whole stay in the Schengen area
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)

Proof of occupation and financial background 
- Labour contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the confirmation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months
- Social insurance booklet with updated information (copy)

- In case of employee

- In case of businessman

- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment

- In case of retired person

- Retirement book (original + copy)
- Proof of other income, if relevant ( i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of students

- Student ID
- Confirmation from school/ university on a letterhead paper regarding the stats of the student and consent with absent if during school year
Proof of social integration in the country of residence: 
- Confirmation of residence information with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs f bonds of the applicant to the home country, such as ownership of real-estate, background of the closet family members (e.g. labour contracts, proof of their income, school confirmation of attendance in the study programme, etc.
- Wedding certificate (original +copy) in case that the application is married
- Birth certificate (original +copy) in case that the applicant has children
For Minor 
- If traveling with one parent only, written consent of the other parent or guardian.
- If traveling without parents, written consent of both parents/ guardians.
- Birth certificate
- Parents’ passport/ ID copy
Other documents 
- Specify
Important Note:
- Vietnamese document need to be presented with an official translation to Czech or English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice).
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected.
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendar days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 
           45 days. There is no express fee for faster visa appointment or procedure.
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserve the right to request an interview.
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant
I have been informed and accept:
- That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process,
- That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application,
- That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.

## Photo Specifications
To see the visa application photo specifications, please, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Mp3cgDm0NMbnh5NUx91Aw/dd7073e0df81e54eae51fe1d61ff124c/Photo-spacifications-Recent.pdf).

visa_types.name: Visiting Family and Friends
visa_types.documents_required:
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5 cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:

- Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least two free pages, issued in previous 10 years;
- Non-Vietnamese applicant: Residence permit in Vietnam + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian or Australia visas.

- Purpose of travel and conditions of stay
- Invitation letter issued by the inviting person, stating the purpose of visit, dates and conditions of stay.
- If sponsored:

- Invitation form issued by Czech police for Foreigners (Original +copy)
- Proof of family or other relation with the sponsor (e.g birth certificate, marriage certificate) in original +copy
- Copy of Czech residence permit or Czech ID of the sponsor
- Bank statement of the sponsor’s current account in the Czech Republic for the last 3 months

- Round air-ticket reservation
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Proof of accommodation, if not provided by sponsor.
Proof of occupation and financial background:
- In case of employee:

- Labor contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the conformation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months

- In case of businessman:

- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment

- In case of retired person:

- Retirement book (original+ copy)
- Proof of other income, if relevant (i.e. remittances, income from property, etc)

- In case of peasant:

- Land use right (original +copy)
- Written declaration how the land is used
- Proof of regular income for the last 3 months, such as current bank account statements (saving accounts statements not accepted)
- Proof of other income, if relevant (i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of students:

- Student ID
- Confirmation from the school/university on a letterhead paper regarding the status of the student and the consent with absence if during school year)
Proof of social integration in the country of residence 
- Family book/ household registration with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs of bonds of the applicant to the home-country
For minor:
- If travelling with one parent only- written consent of the other parent or guardian. If travelling without parents, written consent of both parents/guardians.
- Birth certificate
- Parent’s passport/ ID copies
- Other documents
Important note:
- Vietnamese documents need to be presented with an official translation to Czech of English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice)
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendars days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserves the right to request an interview
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant 
 I have been informed and accept: 
i.	That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process
ii.	That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application
iii.	That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ 
								Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application
iv.	That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.

CHECKLIST FOR VISITING FRIEND AND FAMILY – please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Z1vqSY7c8kF8SxWTwNV3x/3280b55b389f97812466035f9675fd3e/Checklist_Visit_to_family_friend_CZE_2023.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category, kindly refer to the information sheet of documents required.
Important notes: in  case the applicants is accompanied by travel agencies or  intermediary individuals to prepare and submit documents, travel agencies or  intermediary individuals must obtain power of attorney of the applicant (with  applicant's signature, certified by local authority) to enter VAC with the applicant. Visa Application  Center for Czech Republic shall maintain the rights to refuse third party to  enter our Center if the power of attorney is missing.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category, kindly refer to the information sheet of documents required.
Important notes: in  case the applicants is accompanied by travel agencies or  intermediary individuals to prepare and submit documents, travel agencies or  intermediary individuals must obtain power of attorney of the applicant (with  applicant's signature, certified by local authority) to enter VAC with the applicant. Visa Application  Center for Czech Republic shall maintain the rights to refuse third party to  enter our Center if the power of attorney is missing. 

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for June 2026:

[Table:  Visiting Family and Friends]

- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per current exchange rate and will be updated later. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee in cash or through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.

Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/premium-services) for the price list of Additional Services.

## Documents Required
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION
- Visa application form, completely filled out, dated and signed
- Photograph (4,5 x 3,5 cm)
- Valid passport + copy of data page:

- Valid at least 3 months after intended return to Vietnam, has got at least two free pages, issued in previous 10 years;
- Non-Vietnamese applicant: Residence permit in Vietnam + copy
- Copies of previous Schengen, US, Canadian or Australia visas.

- Purpose of travel and conditions of stay
- Invitation letter issued by the inviting person, stating the purpose of visit, dates and conditions of stay.
- If sponsored:

- Invitation form issued by Czech police for Foreigners (Original +copy)
- Proof of family or other relation with the sponsor (e.g birth certificate, marriage certificate) in original +copy

- Round air-ticket reservation
- Travel medical insurance. Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Proof of accommodation, if not provided by sponsor.
Proof of occupation and financial background:
- In case of employee:

- Labor contract or decision of appointment
- Letter from the employer on a letterhead company paper stating employment status, position held, date of recruitment, length of contract, salary and the conformation of granted leave
- Bank statement for last 3 months

- In case of businessman:

- Original certificate of company registration (copy to be submitted)
- Bank statement for the last 3 months
- Declaration of tax payment

- In case of retired person:

- Retirement book (original+ copy)
- Proof of other income, if relevant (i.e. remittances, income from property, etc)

- In case of peasant:

- Land use right (original +copy)
- Written declaration how the land is used
- Proof of regular income for the last 3 months, such as current bank account statements (saving accounts statements not accepted)
- Proof of other income, if relevant (i.e. remittances, income from property, etc.)

- In case of students:

- Student ID
- Confirmation from the school/university on a letterhead paper regarding the status of the student and the consent with absence if during school year)
Proof of social integration in the country of residence 
- Family book/ household registration with update information (original + copy)
- Possibly, any other proofs of bonds of the applicant to the home-country
For minor:
- If travelling with one parent only- written consent of the other parent or guardian. If travelling without parents, written consent of both parents/guardians.
- Birth certificate
- Parent’s passport/ ID copies
- Other documents
Important note:
- Vietnamese documents need to be presented with an official translation to Czech of English language (by translator certified by Department of Justice)
- In all applicants aged 12 and older fingerprints must be collected
- Visa applications are decided within 15 calendars days. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. There is no express fee for a faster visa appointment or procedure
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi reserves the right to request an interview
- If you are asked by any visa facilitator for any kind of fee on behalf of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in Hanoi, kindly report the incident to the Vietnamese police as well as to the Embassy. This does not apply to the service fee and additional service fee of the external service provider VFS Global visa center.
Declaration of the applicant 
 I have been informed and accept: 
i.	That my passport and requested original documents will be held by the embassy during via application process
ii.	That presenting an incomplete application form and file may result in a refusal of my visa application
iii.	That presenting supporting documents which are not update, true or indicate that I am planning to stay in the Czech Republic/ 
								Schengen area longer than 90 days within 180-day period may result in a refusal of my visa application
iv.	That there is no legal right for receiving a visa and in case of refusal, and the visa fee is not refundable.

To see the visa application photo  specifications, please, click  here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4cWkdcdi2vMWJYZq4o0toT/1e14cf9f84deb64a819767d13c8c9c66/Visiting-Family-and-Friends-Photo-Specifications-Recent.pdf).

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
Please be noted that only below types of visa category as listed below are collected by VFS Global. Other types of visa category must be submitted directly at the Embassy of Czech Republic in Vietnam.
- Tourism (#Tourism)
- Business (#Business)
- Visiting family and Friends (#Visiting-family-and-Friends)
- Others (Sport, Cultural, Scientific events and Study short stay) (#Others)
Under Article 22 of the Visa Code, a Member State may require the central authorities of other Member States to consult its central authorities during the examination of visa applications lodged by nationals of specific third countries or specific categories of such nationals. Such consultation does not apply to applications for airport transit visas. Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6Z2cGVee9Cx2kWfkC3tQHm/270b0de19e7bcc8cae7a4f010954f7c2/article-22-nov-24-cze-vnm-en.pdf) to see the lists the third countries and the specific categories concerned. When a third country is listed it means that at least one Member State requires such prior consultation.
Under Article 31 of the Visa Code, a Member State may require its central authorities be informed of visas issued by consulates of other Member States to nationals of specific third countries or specific categories of such nationals. Such information cannot be requested for issued airport transit visas. Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/e7a2xqPfQQlH1caiu8cfp/b87eb8b020e4c76a0c39f1f3ba8488ae/article-31-nov-24-cze-vnm-en.pdf) to see the lists the third countries and the specific categories concerned. When a third country is listed it means that at least one Member State requires such ex post information.
For residence permit application, applicant must submit directly at the Embassy of Czech Republic in Hanoi.
Important notes: in case the applicants is accompanied by travel agencies or intermediary individuals to prepare and submit documents, travel agencies or intermediary individuals must obtain power of attorney of the applicant (with applicant's signature, certified by local authority) to enter VAC with the applicant. Visa Application Center for Czech Republic shall maintain the rights to refuse third party to enter our Center if the power of attorney is missing.
Please click here for your information about the harmonized list of supporting document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YdlY8ThMUzfHiSz9E0ovK/b5aad315a4c0ecc1be74423ab6b80c1a/Vietnam-Harmonised-List-of-Supporting-Documents-2026.pdf)
